_note: Conservative list of exported symbols in packages/next/src/server/ that are never imported or referenced outside their defining file across the entire packages/ directory. errorToJSON and RenderOptsExtra are in render.tsx (used internally only). getFreePort is the sole export of server/lib/worker-utils.ts with zero external imports. StaticRenderResultMetadata and RenderResultResponse are in render-result.ts, used only internally. NextServerOptions and NextBundlerOptions are types in next.ts never imported elsewhere. Each verified by grep -rn across packages/ excluding node_modules and dist/.
